explanation: I selected the tax year for the report.
The tax year is set, so I am moving to the income source.
I chose self-employment as the income source.
The income source is selected, so I am moving to how the income changed.
I selected stopped income, which means the new amount should be zero.
The change type is complete, so I am moving to the previous amount.
I entered the previous monthly amount before the income stopped.
The previous amount is complete, so I am moving to the new amount.
I entered an initial new amount, which should be checked against the stopped-income rule.
The service should validate that a stopped income must have a zero new amount.
I corrected the new monthly amount to zero because the income stopped.
The corrected amount should allow the journey to continue to contact details.
I chose post as the contact method.
I entered the postal address for follow-up contact.
The contact details are complete, so I am moving to supporting notes.
I added a short note explaining why the income stopped.
The route is complete, so I am moving to the review page.

action.summary: I recovered from the nonzero stopped-income amount, corrected it to zero, and reached the review page with the final stopped-income details.

explanation: The review page shows the corrected stopped-income details, so I am ending the task.
